Leads are added manually on a weekly basis.

name: RTO Authority - MaxBounty Exclusive - SOI (US)
description:
RTO Authority is owned and operated by MaxBounty. Users gain access to rent to own listings in their area that fit their specific criteria.

Converts on completed one page SOI (name and email address).

No guaranteeing approval, exact rates or monthly payment numbers.

Prepop Paramaters: firstName={firstname}&lastName={lastname}&email={email}
Step1: Add &X= to the end of your affiliate link.

Step 2: Encode the prepop fields. An example of a working prepop at the end of your affiliate link would be: &x=firstName%3Dfirstname%26lastName%3Dlastname%26email%3Demailaddress

name: Binixo - Loan Broker - CPL (RO)
description:
Binixo is an online loan brokerage and comparison platform, allowing users to find favorable loan options with ease. With flexible credit terms and no restrictions on credit history, Binixo provides access to loans starting from 200 RON, operating 24/7 to assist users in securing quick financial solutions.

Converts on a qualified lead submission with valid email and phone information.

Targeting: Individuals seeking quick financial assistance and flexible loan options, including those with varied credit histories. Ideal for young adults, middle-aged users, and small business owners who prefer a fast, reliable online application process for personal or short-term loans.

Restrictions: No brand bidding, doorway traffic, ClickUnder, PopUnder, PopUp, incent traffic, or toolbar traffic. Use of the brand name, including any variations, in ad content or keywords is strictly prohibited and will result in account ban and traffic rejection.

name: Oojo Travel - International Flight Booking - CPS (DE)
description:
Customers can find, compare and book cheap flights with Oojo Travel.

Offer converts on a reservation booking.

Targeting: German travel enthusiasts looking for a platform to search and compare flights. Major city in the US to any major city in Europe (e.g. New York - London), India (e.g. New York - Delhi), Asia (e.g. Washington - Manilla) and MENA region Major city in Canada to any major city in Europe, India, Asia and MENA region Major city in the UK to any major city in India, Asia and MENA region

Top Travel Destinations for DE: India, Philippines, Turkey, Morocco, UAE, Canada, Australia and UK
